entities.notes: All 19 entities approved. D-001 (stock deduction at submission with reversal), D-002 (single PIN per user), D-003 (dual order+item cooking status), D-004 (denormalized transaction for immutable receipts) — all recommended defaults accepted.

api_endpoints.notes: All 74 endpoints approved across 12 domains. D-030 (stock deduction at submission), D-031 (last-write-wins + domain-specific merge), D-032 (client-side HTML receipt), D-033 (client-side SheetJS export) — all recommended defaults accepted.

tech_stack.notes: Full stack approved: React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind (frontend), Zustand + Dexie.js (offline-first state), Express.js + PostgreSQL (sync server), local-auth-hash with bcrypt (no JWT). D-050 through D-056 — all recommended defaults accepted.

architecture.notes: Offline-first PWA architecture approved. 4 role-specific interfaces, 10 Zustand stores, event-style cross-domain communication, interface-based routing, PIN modal overlay. D-060 through D-066 — all recommended defaults accepted.

notes: Full approval of all proposal sections. All 22 decisions accepted with recommended defaults. 100% feature coverage confirmed with 0 blocking gaps.

next_action.instructions: Proceed with foundation builder setup. No modifications required.
